_meta.purpose: Class-based score multipliers applied AFTER base use case scoring. Encodes practical market knowledge about what each machine class is actually used for and sold into.

classes.full_size_backhoe: Operating weight >13,000 lbs, HP >70. Core utility/construction machines. Case 580/590, Cat 416/420/430, JCB 3CX, JD 310SG through 320 P-Tier, NH B95C.
classes.compact_tlb: Operating weight 4,000–13,000 lbs. Tractor-loader-backhoe. Kubota M62, L47, B26; JCB 3CX14, 3DX; Case 580K (vintage). Multi-purpose farm/property/light utility machines.
classes.sub_compact_tlb: Operating weight <4,000 lbs. Kubota BX23S class. Property and estate machines, not commercial.
classes.compact_tracked_backhoe: Rubber track drive. JCB 1CXT class. Urban access, tight sites, landscaping in confined spaces.

_meta.application: Multiply base score (0–100) by the class multiplier, then cap at 100. A multiplier of 1.0 = no adjustment. Values above 1.0 reward natural fit. Values below 1.0 penalize poor fit. The class_bonus field in use_case_rules.json (0–15 pts) is the maximum additive bonus; multipliers operate on the combined spec+feature score before that bonus is added.

full_size_backhoe._notes: Natural home for heavy utility, commercial construction, and infrastructure work. Penalized for property/estate use where size is a liability.

trenching.rationale: Purpose-built for production trenching; full breakout force and dig depth

water_line_install.rationale: Deep utility work is the bread-and-butter market for full-size backhoes

sewer_line_install.rationale: Depth and breakout force requirements favor full-size; stable platform for grade work

septic_install.rationale: High demand job; full-size handles tank excavation and absorption field trenching

foundation_digging.rationale: Weight and breakout force suited for hardpan, clay, rocky soil

general_construction.rationale: Core market application; most commercial construction sites

loading_trucks.rationale: Loader capacity and travel speed suit production truck-loading cycles

material_handling.rationale: Capable but wheel loaders often preferred for high-volume handling

pallet_handling.rationale: Oversized for most pallet work; forks are an add-on use case not primary

demolition_light.rationale: Weight and breakout force appropriate; hammer attachment critical

utility_work.rationale: Full-size backhoe is the #1 machine in the underground utility market

road_work.rationale: Good road machine, but graders/dozers preferred for production grading

landscaping.rationale: Full-size can be too large and damaging for finished landscaping sites

farm_use.rationale: Works but TLBs are more popular on farms due to versatility and maneuverability

property_maintenance.rationale: Oversized for most property maintenance; site access and ground pressure concerns

drainage_work.rationale: Dig depth and stability well-suited for drainage and culvert work

snow_removal.rationale: Capable snow pusher; enclosed cab and power preferred; wheel loaders more common

compact_tlb._notes: The Swiss Army knife class. Broad use case fit but rarely best-in-class for heavy commercial work. Farm, property, and light utility sweet spot.

trenching.rationale: Adequate for shallow/medium trenching; dig depth and breakout limit heavy production

water_line_install.rationale: Short-run residential water service work; not suitable for deep main runs

septic_install.rationale: Popular for residential septic; M62 and L47 class well-matched to tank excavation

foundation_digging.rationale: Force and reach not adequate for commercial foundations; residential crawl space only

general_construction.rationale: Light commercial and residential jobsites; weight limits usefulness in heavy soil

loading_trucks.rationale: Bucket capacity limits productivity; suitable for small dump trucks and trailers

material_handling.rationale: Strong niche — skid steer quick attach + forks combination is highly versatile

pallet_handling.rationale: Compact TLBs with quick attach shine at pallet/material handling on farms and properties

demolition_light.rationale: Limited by reach, breakout force, and attachment hydraulic flow

utility_work.rationale: Light utility work only; depth and force constraints limit commercial utility use

road_work.rationale: Too light for production road work; grading small driveways only

landscaping.rationale: Excellent class fit — maneuverable, light ground pressure, versatile attachments

farm_use.rationale: The primary farm market machine; post holes, drainage, feed handling, property tasks

property_maintenance.rationale: Ideal size for estate and property work; tight access, minimal ground damage

drainage_work.rationale: Adequate for residential drainage; medium channel work; not commercial storm systems

snow_removal.rationale: Good residential snow pusher; smaller bucket limits production; popular on farms

sub_compact_tlb._notes: Property and estate machines. Not commercial tools. Valued for size, maneuverability, and multi-task capability on large residential lots.

trenching.rationale: Very limited dig depth and force; narrow residential applications only

water_line_install.rationale: Barely adequate for shallow residential service lines

sewer_line_install.rationale: Insufficient depth for most sewer work

septic_install.rationale: Marginal; shallow tank excavation possible but field trenching is slow

foundation_digging.rationale: Not suitable; force, depth, and stability all insufficient

general_construction.rationale: Occasional light tasks only; not a production construction machine

loading_trucks.rationale: Bucket capacity too small for truck loading efficiency

material_handling.rationale: Surprisingly capable with quick attach forks; moving modest loads around property

pallet_handling.rationale: Good for light pallet work with quick attach; garden supply, nursery use

demolition_light.rationale: Not adequate for any meaningful demolition

utility_work.rationale: Not a utility machine; residential irrigation and shallow service only

landscaping.rationale: Excellent class fit — maneuverable, low ground pressure, easy to transport

farm_use.rationale: Strong hobby farm and small property machine; PTO, loader, and backhoe in one

property_maintenance.rationale: Best-in-class for large residential lot work; the reason this machine exists

snow_removal.rationale: Good residential snow tool; small bucket but maneuverable; popular with hobby farms

compact_tracked_backhoe._notes: Urban and confined-access niche. Track drive enables soft ground and slope work. JCB 1CXT class. Valued where wheeled machines can't go.

trenching.rationale: Excellent for urban trenching — low ground pressure, soft ground, tight access

water_line_install.rationale: Good for service line work in soft or wet conditions

sewer_line_install.rationale: Adequate depth for lateral work; preferred in confined or soft-ground sites

septic_install.rationale: Capable in soft ground; weight limits may help on saturated sites

foundation_digging.rationale: Limited by bucket force and reach; confined site access is the only advantage

general_construction.rationale: Niche use; valuable where wheeled equipment can't access

loading_trucks.rationale: Bucket capacity and reach limit truck loading efficiency

material_handling.rationale: Tracks allow access to soft ground for material moving

pallet_handling.rationale: Not a primary use case; quick coupler helps but capacity limited

demolition_light.rationale: Urban demo niche — low ground pressure, indoor access possible, hammer attachment

utility_work.rationale: Excellent urban utility niche — fits in tight utility corridors and soft ground

road_work.rationale: Tracks limit speed; useful for shoulder trench work in soft ground

landscaping.rationale: Tracks protect turf; excellent for soft ground, slopes, and tight spaces

farm_use.rationale: Low ground pressure valuable in wet fields; limited loader capacity

property_maintenance.rationale: Tracks prevent rutting on lawns and soft ground — strong fit

drainage_work.rationale: Low ground pressure ideal for wet drainage sites; good trench access

snow_removal.rationale: Tracks not ideal for pavement snow; limited speed and bucket capacity

class_assignment_rules.description: How to assign a machine to a class based on registry specs
